option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.example</groupId> <artifactId>openapi-copilot</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<name>OpenAPI Copilot Plugin</name> <description>GitHub Copilot-compatible plugin using OpenAI-compatible API endpoints</description>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> <intellij.version>2023.2</intellij.version> <plugin.version>1.0.0</plugin.version> </properties>
<repositories> <!-- IntelliJ Platform repositories --> <repository> <id>intellij-releases</id> <url>https://cache-redirector.jetbrains.com/intellij-repository/releases</url> </repository> <repository> <id>intellij-snapshots</id> <url>https://cache-redirector.jetbrains.com/intellij-snapshot-repository</url> </repository> <!-- For 3rd party dependencies --> <repository> <id>central</id> <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencies> <!-- IntelliJ Platform SDK - installed to local Maven repo from IDEA 2025.3.3 --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-app</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- util-8.jar: core platform APIs (ApplicationManager, Project, PSI, etc.) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-util-8</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- util.jar: ComponentManager, AreaInstance --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-util</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- util_rt.jar: Pair, ThrowableComputable --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-util-rt</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- annotations.jar: @NotNull, @Nullable --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-annotations</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Gson for JSON processing --> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.code.gson</groupId> <artifactId>gson</artifactId> <version>2.10.1</version> </dependency>
<!-- Logging (optional) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId> <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId> <version>2.0.7</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <!-- Maven Compiler Plugin --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.11.0</version> <configuration> <source>${java.version}</source> <target>${java.version}</target> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Maven Resources Plugin --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-resources-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.3.1</version> <configuration> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Maven Assembly Plugin --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-assembly-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.6.0</version> <executions> <execution> <id>make-assembly</id> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>single</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> <configuration> <descriptorRefs> <descriptorRef>jar-with-dependencies</descriptorRef> </descriptorRefs> <archive> <manifest> <addDefaultImplementationEntries>true</addDefaultImplementationEntries> <addDefaultSpecificationEntries>true</addDefaultSpecificationEntries> </manifest> </archive> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Build helper plugin to set plugin version from pom.xml --> <plugin> <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId> <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.4.0</version> <executions> <execution> <id>parse-version</id> <goals> <goal>parse-version</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
<profiles> <!-- IntelliJ IDEA Development Profile --> <profile> <id>intellij-dev</id> <activation> <file> <exists>${env.IDEA_HOME}/bin/idea.sh</exists> </file> </activation> <build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.1.0</version> <executions> <execution> <phase>install</phase> <goals> <goal>run</goal> </goals> <configuration> <target>
<!-- Copy JAR to IntelliJ plugins directory --> <copy file="${project.build.directory}/${project.build.finalName}-jar-with-dependencies.jar" tofile="C:/Program Files/JetBrains/IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.3/plugins/openapi-copilot-${plugin.version}.jar"/> </target> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </profile> </profiles> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.example</groupId> <artifactId>openapi-copilot</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<name>OpenAPI Copilot Plugin</name> <description>GitHub Copilot-compatible plugin using OpenAI-compatible API endpoints</description>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> <intellij.version>2023.2</intellij.version> <plugin.version>1.0.0</plugin.version> </properties>
<repositories> <!-- IntelliJ Platform repositories --> <repository> <id>intellij-releases</id> <url>https://cache-redirector.jetbrains.com/intellij-repository/releases</url> </repository> <repository> <id>intellij-snapshots</id> <url>https://cache-redirector.jetbrains.com/intellij-snapshot-repository</url> </repository> <!-- For 3rd party dependencies --> <repository> <id>central</id> <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencies> <!-- IntelliJ Platform SDK - installed to local Maven repo from IDEA 2025.3.3 --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-app</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- util-8.jar: core platform APIs (ApplicationManager, Project, PSI, etc.) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-util-8</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- util.jar: ComponentManager, AreaInstance --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-util</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- util_rt.jar: Pair, ThrowableComputable --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-util-rt</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> <!-- annotations.jar: @NotNull, @Nullable --> <dependency> <groupId>com.jetbrains.intellij.local</groupId> <artifactId>idea-annotations</artifactId> <version>2025.3.3</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Gson for JSON processing --> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.code.gson</groupId> <artifactId>gson</artifactId> <version>2.10.1</version> </dependency>
<!-- Logging (optional) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId> <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId> <version>2.0.7</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <!-- Maven Compiler Plugin --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.11.0</version> <configuration> <source>${java.version}</source> <target>${java.version}</target> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Maven Resources Plugin --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-resources-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.3.1</version> <configuration> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Maven Assembly Plugin --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-assembly-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.6.0</version> <executions> <execution> <id>make-assembly</id> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>single</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> <configuration> <descriptorRefs> <descriptorRef>jar-with-dependencies</descriptorRef> </descriptorRefs> <archive> <manifest> <addDefaultImplementationEntries>true</addDefaultImplementationEntries> <addDefaultSpecificationEntries>true</addDefaultSpecificationEntries> </manifest> </archive> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Build helper plugin to set plugin version from pom.xml --> <plugin> <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId> <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.4.0</version> <executions> <execution> <id>parse-version</id> <goals> <goal>parse-version</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> </plugin>
<!-- Copy plugin JAR to IntelliJ user plugins directory after packaging --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.1.0</version> <executions> <execution> <id>deploy-plugin</id> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>run</goal> </goals> <configuration> <target> <!-- Create the plugin lib directory if it doesn't exist --> <mkdir dir="${env.APPDATA}/JetBrains/IntelliJIdea2025.3/plugins/kalynx-copilot/lib"/> <!-- Copy the fat JAR into the plugin lib folder --> <copy overwrite="true" file="${project.build.directory}/${project.build.finalName}-jar-with-dependencies.jar" tofile="${env.APPDATA}/JetBrains/IntelliJIdea2025.3/plugins/kalynx-copilot/lib/kalynx-copilot.jar"/> <echo message="Plugin deployed to ${env.APPDATA}/JetBrains/IntelliJIdea2025.3/plugins/kalynx-copilot/lib/kalynx-copilot.jar"/> </target> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<idea-plugin> <id>com.example.githubcopilotopenapi</id> <name>OpenAPI Copilot</name> <vendor url="https://example.com">Your Company</vendor>
<description> <![CDATA[ GitHub Copilot-compatible plugin that uses any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. ]]> </description>
<depends>com.intellij.modules.platform</depends> <depends>com.intellij.modules.java</depends>
<extensions defaultExtensionNs="com.intellij"> <completion.contributor language="JAVA" implementationClass="copilot.CopilotCompletionContributor"/> <notificationGroup id="copilot.notification.group" displayType="BALLOON"/> </extensions>
<actions> <action id="copilot.settings.action" class="copilot.actions.OpenCopilotSettingsAction" text="Open Copilot Settings..." description="Configure OpenAI-compatible API endpoint"> <add-to-group group-id="ToolsMenu" anchor="last"/> </action> </actions> </idea-plugin>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<idea-plugin> <id>com.kalynx.copilot</id> <name>Kalynx Copilot</name> <vendor url="https://kalynx.com">Kalynx</vendor>
<description> <![CDATA[ Kalynx Copilot — an agentic AI coding assistant powered by any OpenAI-compatible API. Features a chat tool window with multi-turn conversations, tool-calling capabilities (read/write files, search project), and context-aware code assistance. ]]> </description>
<depends>com.intellij.modules.platform</depends> <depends>com.intellij.modules.java</depends>
<extensions defaultExtensionNs="com.intellij"> <!-- Persistent settings --> <applicationService serviceImplementation="copilot.CopilotSettings"/>
<!-- Chat tool window --> <toolWindow id="Kalynx Copilot" secondary="false" anchor="right" canCloseContents="false" factoryClass="copilot.chat.CopilotChatToolWindowFactory"/>
<!-- Notification group --> <notificationGroup id="copilot.notification.group" displayType="BALLOON"/> </extensions>
<actions> <!-- Settings action --> <action id="copilot.settings.action" class="copilot.actions.OpenCopilotSettingsAction" text="Kalynx Copilot Settings..." description="Configure Kalynx Copilot API endpoint and model"> <add-to-group group-id="ToolsMenu" anchor="last"/> </action>
<!-- Ask Copilot — right-click context menu and keyboard shortcut --> <action id="copilot.ask.action" class="copilot.actions.AskCopilotAction" text="Ask Kalynx Copilot" description="Open Copilot chat with the selected code as context"> <add-to-group group-id="EditorPopupMenu" anchor="last"/> <keyboard-shortcut keymap="$default" first-keystroke="ctrl shift PERIOD"/> </action> </actions> </idea-plugin>
